product.name: Arox T0 WR/WP
product.specLine: 70 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
descriptions: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane waterproof fabric for all kind of medical cloth. Tested for EN 14126. Arox T0 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical cover.
It can be washed at 60'C and used again.
70 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 500N ; Weft > 400N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 15N ; Weft > 10N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: Application image labels: Tulum, Isolation Gown
Can be used for medical cover
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product is explicitly described as a barrier medical fabric intended for medical cover, isolation gowns and coveralls, with medical application field and image labels directly stating medical garment use.

evidence: Application image labels: Tulum, Isolation Gown
primary.rationale: Explicitly positioned as a barrier medical fabric for isolation gowns and medical covers, with direct medical application field, image labels and EN 14126 biological protection certification.

secondary.rationale: No independently stated secondary end use beyond medical; antibacterial, waterproof and chemical resistance properties support the medical use rather than a separate application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN 13034/EN 343 chemical/weather protection is subsumed within the explicit medical isolation-gown use, not a separate general workwear use.
